$comment: Motion design tokens synthesized from Material/Material 3, Fluent/Windows, Carbon, Apple HIG, WCAG, and web.dev RAIL. Durations in ms. Research-backed defaults — modulate for travel distance, surface size, and platform. See references/research-basis.md for attribution.

enter.use: small enter: tooltip, toast, menu (150-250 web / 180-250 mobile)

exit.use: small exit; keep shorter than enter (120-200)

stagger.use: short offset to lead the eye; cap total group time

reducedMotion.$comment: When the user requests reduced motion, collapse durations toward 0 and replace spatial motion (slide/scale/parallax/depth) with opacity cross-fades or instant state changes plus a color/highlight cue. Preserve meaning; never just delete it.
